name: Very Blueberry Cheesecake
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine crumbs and margarine, pressing onto the bottom of a 9-inch springform pan. Chill.
2. Chill the gelatin in water until dissolved.
3. Stir the dissolved gelatin over low heat into the cream cheese mixture. Mix at medium speed on an electric mixer until well blended.
4. Blend in lemon juice and lemon peel.
5. Beat in marshmallow creme; fold in whipped topping. Puree blueberries; fold into the cream cheese mixture.
6. Chill until firm.
7. Garnish with additional frozen whipped topping, thawed, and lemon peel.
VARIATIONS:
Substitute Neufchatel cheese for cream cheese.
Substitute strawberry slices for blueberries
Substitute raspberries for blueberries
